note: Seed entries for OM support. Voice envelope (role + house-style + output contract) is applied at runtime, not stored here.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer reports their campaign is live but not visible on their site.
entries.scenario_instruction: Do not speculate about root causes. Ask the customer to confirm campaign status, targeting rules, and whether the embed/pixel is installed. Link to the troubleshooting doc if provided.

entries.scenario_summary: New customer unsure how to install the OM embed or pixel.
entries.scenario_instruction: Assume the customer has not installed correctly. Walk through the install check. Link to the official install doc.

entries.scenario_title: Targeting rules not firing as expected
entries.scenario_summary: Campaign loads but targeting (page-level, referrer, cookie) isn't behaving as set.
entries.scenario_instruction: Ask for the exact URL tested and the current targeting config before proposing a cause.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer reports exit-intent works on desktop but not mobile.
entries.scenario_instruction: Explain OM's mobile exit-intent behaviour plainly. Do not promise a fix if the expected behaviour matches product design.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer sees 0 conversions or 0 impressions despite live campaigns.
entries.scenario_instruction: Ask the customer to confirm the embed is active and whether any ad-blockers / cookie banners are on the test browser. Link to the analytics troubleshooting doc.

entries.scenario_summary: Connected email/CRM integration stopped syncing leads.
entries.scenario_instruction: Ask customer to reconnect the integration. Request the integration name and when it last worked before deeper investigation.

entries.scenario_title: A/B test not splitting traffic correctly
entries.scenario_summary: Customer running an A/B test reports uneven traffic distribution.
entries.scenario_instruction: Confirm their A/B setup matches documented behaviour before assuming a bug. Request screenshots/URLs.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer hits a 500 error on the analytics dashboard (known issue previously flagged).
entries.scenario_instruction: Acknowledge the issue. Do not promise an ETA unless engineering has confirmed one. Offer a workaround if one is documented.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer asking how DSD works or why it behaves a certain way across devices.
entries.scenario_instruction: Explain DSD's documented behaviour. Do not describe features not yet released.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer setting up MonsterLinks for the first time.
entries.scenario_instruction: Walk through the MonsterLinks setup. Link to the official MonsterLinks doc.

entries.scenario_title: Cloudflare / caching causing campaign load issues
entries.scenario_summary: Customer's campaign is affected by Cloudflare, Rocket Loader, or aggressive caching.
entries.scenario_instruction: Ask the customer to confirm caching setup before recommending changes. Link to the caching troubleshooting doc.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer requests refund within OM's standard refund policy window.
entries.scenario_instruction: Confirm plan and charge date before quoting any refund amount. Do not promise timelines outside standard policy.

entries.scenario_summary: Refund request falls outside standard window; needs careful handling or escalation.
entries.scenario_instruction: Confirm plan and charge date. Do not commit to a refund outside standard policy without confirming with the team.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer surprised by an auto-renewal charge and disputing it.
entries.scenario_instruction: Confirm the plan, renewal date, and charge date. Do not speculate about why they weren't expecting it.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer asking to downgrade, often a churn signal.
entries.scenario_instruction: Lead with value the customer has already gotten on the current plan. Do not push aggressively; close with clear next step if they still want to downgrade.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer hitting a plan limit and asking about upgrade.
entries.scenario_instruction: Name the limit they've hit. Link to the plan comparison doc. Do not upsell features irrelevant to their stated need.

entries.scenario_summary: Pre-sale lead asking what happens after trial or how conversion works.
entries.scenario_instruction: Answer the conversion question plainly. Link to pricing / plan doc. Do not oversell.

entries.scenario_summary: Customer requesting a VAT invoice, tax form, or corrected billing detail.
entries.scenario_instruction: Confirm the account and plan before responding. Do not commit to tax-detail changes without confirming they're supported.
